name: Aldrich, Robert
evidence: A Robert Aldrich is associated with an address in Austin 78745 (public-records match to the donor zip), but no occupation or employer could be confirmed. An active Democratic donor (FEC lean 0.99, 30 gifts). Common name; cannot corroborate a career, so no industry is assigned.

name: Berlanga, Hugo
resolved_employer: Berlanga Business Consultants (government-affairs consultant / registered Texas lobbyist)
evidence: Hugo Berlanga (b. 1948, Corpus Christi) is a former Democratic Texas state representative (Dist. 34, 1983-1998) and Speaker Pro Tempore who retired to found Berlanga Business Consultants, providing government-affairs services; a registered Texas lobbyist. Matches donor occupation 'Consultant/Self' and Corpus Christi 78404 location.

affiliations.role: Registered Texas lobbyist; former state representative

name: Gonzalez, Andres
evidence: San Antonio 78216 donor to three Travis County officials (Travillion, Shea, Howard), 2021-2023, no occupation listed. 'Andres Gonzalez' is a very common South Texas name and no public source could be matched to this specific person/zip. No industry assigned.

name: Girard, Michael
evidence: No zip or occupation in the record. Austin has multiple Michael Girards (e.g. CEO of Girard Diversified Interests; a Lake Travis Trail Coalition volunteer) and none could be tied to this specific one-time 2021 gift to Ann Howard. Identity unconfirmed, so no industry assigned.

name: Hunziker, Emil
evidence: J. Emil Hunziker, retired from Lockheed Martin, lives at 5506 Duval St, Austin 78751 (matches donor zip) and gives to progressive local candidates (also gave to Michael Siegel). Identity is high-confidence; exact Lockheed job function is unconfirmed, so the Engineering label (aerospace/defense) is medium. Signed an AURA urbanist petition.

evidence: Jack Gullahorn is a prominent Austin lobbyist and attorney who founded and led (15 yrs) the Professional Advocacy Association of Texas (PAAT), the lobbyists' trade association. Distinctive name; a well-known Capitol figure. Gave to Travillion.

affiliations.role: Founder, President & General Counsel; registered lobbyist

name: Delia Garza Campaign
